title: LC-MS/MS (EAD) - deep structural lipid annotation tutorial dataset (for MS-DIAL5)
author: Takeuchi, Manami
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset is designed for use with molecular spectrum and its accompanying tutorial.  It contains: 
 
 A raw data file ( *.wiff/ .wiff.scan/ .wiff2/ .timeseries.data ) of lipid extraction from mouse eye using LC-DDA-MS/MS (EAD, 14eV) 
 Output files ( *_20240126*  and   AlignmentResult_2024_01_26_15* ) generated by MS-DIAL analysis. 
 
  To reproduce the tutorial results:  
 
  Load the project in MS-DIAL:  Open the  For_Molecular_Spectrum_Networking.mdproject  file. Please note that it is necessary that the MS-DIAL analysis output files ( *_20240126*  and   AlignmentResult_2024_01_26_15* ) are also located in the same folder. 
  Follow the tutorial instructions:  Proceed through the tutorial steps to analyze the data and achieve the same results. 
 
 Sample information: 
 
 Bligh & Dyer lipid extraction and solid-phase purification from C57BL/6J mice 
 
 Experiment parameter: 
 
 A Nexera X2 UPLC system (Shimadzu) was used as the LC system.  Lipids were separated using an Imtakt UK-C18 MF column (50 mm × 2 mm:3 μm) (Imtakt). The MS detection of lipids was performed using a QTOF-MS (ZenoTOF 7600; SCIEX).
